title: Assault defined
doc_html:
§36.  Assault defined

Assault is an attempt to commit a battery, or the intentional placing of another in reasonable apprehension of receiving a battery.  

Acts 1978, No. 394, §1.
doc_text:
§36.  Assault defined
Assault is an attempt to commit a battery, or the intentional placing of another in reasonable apprehension of receiving a battery.
Acts 1978, No. 394, §1.
